properties.name: spotify.client-id
properties.description: Spotify app client ID from developer.spotify.com

properties.name: spotify.client-secret
properties.description: Spotify app client secret from developer.spotify.com

properties.name: spotify.redirect-uri
properties.description: OAuth callback URL registered in Spotify dashboard

properties.name: spotify.token-uri
properties.description: Spotify OAuth token exchange endpoint URL

properties.name: spotify.scopes
properties.description: Space-separated list of Spotify permission scopes

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64 encoded secret key for signing JWT tokens

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds e.g. 86400000 for 24 hours
